montreal.name: Port of Montreal
notes: The date published is subject to change based on vessel schedule changes. Dates in red reflect changes from the previous published version
Units may be ingated at any time prior to the terminal vessel cutoff date. CP will not be liable for ERD at the port of loading.
Export recieving accepted 5 days prior to in-land cut-off date.
Please note Minneapolis cutoff has advanced 24 hrs for Route 1, Route 2, & Med A Services.
Route 4 service has advanced 24hrs for all in-land terminals.
